stories.title: Family: Busch died from severe pneumonia, sepsis
stories.summary: Kyle Busch died after severe pneumonia progressed into sepsis, resulting in rapid and overwhelming associated complications, according to a statement released by his family.

stories.title: Florida signs 'Teddy Bridgewater Act' into law
stories.summary: Florida has signed the "Teddy Bridgewater Act" into law, meaning high school coaches in the state will now be able to use their own money to help their players with expenses such as food, transportation, physical therapy and rehabilitation services.

stories.title: Hull City wins scandal-plagued playoff, up to EPL
stories.summary: Hull City have been promoted to the Premier League after a 1-0 win the Championship playoff final against Middlesbrough on Saturday at Wembley Stadium

stories.title: Kerley says he'll run clean at Enhanced Games
stories.summary: American sprinter Fred Kerley says he will run clean at the upcoming Enhanced Games, adding that he also expects to compete at the Los Angeles Olympics in 2028.

stories.title: Latvia stuns the U.S. 4-2 at ice hockey worlds
stories.summary: Sandis Vilmanis scored two empty-net goals to help Latvia upset the United States 4-2 for the defending champion's third loss at the ice hockey world championship.
